title: miliusa montana
intro: Miliusa montana, also known as Himalayan Box or Himalaya Miliusa, is a plant species native to the Himalayan region. It is a type of flowering plant in the Annonaceae family and is traditionally used in medicine for its various health benefits. The plant contains compounds like milusin, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Miliusa montana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for its medicinal properties, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
